metadata.title: LoopOrb - Water Data Ecosystem
metadata.description: Decentralized platform for monitoring, managing and investing in water resources

home.title: Water Data Ecosystem
home.subtitle: Decentralized platform for monitoring and managing water resources

tokenhub.title: Invest in Water Technologies
tokenhub.subtitle: Support LoopOrb ecosystem R&D projects and earn from real technology implementation. Stake UNITY in projects with APY up to 32%.

step1.title: Choose Project
step1.desc: Explore R&D initiatives with full data transparency

step2.title: Stake UNITY
step2.desc: Lock tokens in the project smart contract

step3.title: Earn Returns
step3.desc: APY from 8% to 32% depending on the project

step4.title: Support Science
step4.desc: Your funds go to real development

vod.name: VOD (Commodity)
vod.desc: 1 VOD = 1 m³ of verified water. Emission only upon physical verification

vodeco.name: VODeco (Governance)
vodeco.desc: DAO governance, validator staking, fixed 1B supply

vodcredit.name: VODcredit (SBT)
vodcredit.desc: Participant reputation, non-transferable, earned for contribution

integration.title: ProjectHub Integration
integration.pipelineDesc: Projects from ProjectHub (16 R&D initiatives) go through stages: Concept → Prototype → Pilot → Production

rewards.title: Cross-Platform Rewards
rewards.desc: Participation in ProjectHub projects (data, research) automatically earns VODcredit → increases VOD emission multiplier → increases TokenHub investment returns

swaps.title: Token Swaps
swaps.desc: DEX integration for VOD ↔ VODeco exchange. Liquidity provided through pools with APY 5-15%. Automatic market makers for stability.

pools.title: Liquidity Pools
pools.desc: VOD/TON, VODeco/TON, VOD/VODeco pools. TVL grows proportionally to the number of verified water sources in the network.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Multi-sig contracts, CertiK audit, HSM modules for hardware nodes. Slashing for validator misconduct.

level1.name: Water (VOD)
level1.desc: Base layer — physical asset. Each VOD backed by 1m³ of water.

level2.name: Governance (VODeco)
level2.desc: DAO voting, validation, R&D investments through TokenHub.

level3.name: Reputation (VODcredit)
level3.desc: SBT token for contribution. Affects emission and privileges.

tokenomics.title: Three Tokens, Three Functions
tokenomics.subtitle: Synchronized economy: VOD (commodity), VODeco (governance), VODcredit (reputation). Each token plays its role in the ecosystem.

vod.name: VOD
vod.description: Right to 1 m³ of verified water. Emitted only upon physical volume verification.
vod.backing: 1 m³ of water in licensed storage

vodeco.name: VODeco
vodeco.description: DAO governance token. Fixed emission. Grants voting rights and validation participation.

vodcredit.name: VODcredit
vodcredit.description: Non-transferable reputation token. Earned for ecosystem contribution.

projecthub.title: ProjectHub
projecthub.subtitle: 16 R&D Projects
projecthub.desc: R&D initiatives from concept to production. Each project goes through verification stages and can receive funding through TokenHub.

tokenhub.title: TokenHub
tokenhub.subtitle: Investing & DeFi
tokenhub.desc: B2I interface for investing in R&D projects. Staking with APY 8-32%, DEX integration for token exchange, liquidity for VOD/VODeco.

daoGov.title: DAO Governance
daoGov.subtitle: 4 decision levels
daoGov.desc: Decentralized governance through VODeco. From constitutional to operational decisions — everything is transparent and verifiable on blockchain.

waterBacked.title: Water-Backed
waterBacked.desc: Each VOD backed by 1m³ of water

cta.title: Ready to participate in water economy?
cta.subtitle: Start staking in R&D projects or earn VODcredit for ecosystem contribution.

staking.title: UNITY Staking
staking.subtitle: Lock tokens to support the network and earn passive income

projecthub.title: Research Projects
projecthub.subtitle: LoopOrb ecosystem R&D initiatives from concept to production

dao.title: Decentralized Governance
dao.subtitle: Make decisions on ecosystem development through voting

litepaper.title: VODeco: Water as Economy
litepaper.subtitle: Multi-level water monitoring ecosystem combining IoT, blockchain and automated laboratories

history.title: VODeco History
history.subtitle: The journey from Culligan to global water economy
